posting.raw_text:
[CIC-FIXTURE:applied-ai-engineer]
Applied AI Engineer — Harbour Labs (Sydney)

Join our applied AI team to prototype and productise customer-facing assistants.
You will work closely with solution architects and customer success.

Responsibilities
• Deliver applied AI prototypes into production services
• Fine-tune and evaluate models for customer use cases
• Document patterns for reuse across engagements

Requirements
• 3+ years building ML or AI-powered products required
• Python and FastAPI required; Azure OpenAI preferred
• Stakeholder-facing delivery experience preferred

Location & employment
Hybrid Sydney (Barangaroo), 2 days in office. Full-time permanent.
Salary $140,000–$165,000 AUD.

rendered_markdown:
# David Cropper

**Target role:** AI Engineer

> Owner review required before any external use.

## Summary

AI Engineer with commercial technology experience since 2009 spanning software quality assurance, test automation, and Data Engineering, including 3.5 years of commercial enterprise Data Engineering experience, plus independent AI Engineering and portfolio development.

## Summary themes (from Tailoring Plan)

- Python
- FastAPI
- Azure OpenAI
- Ai Engineering
- Deliver Applied Prototypes Into Production Services

_Summary prose is copied from the career profile in Phase B; theme-guided rewriting is deferred to Phase C._

## Skills

### Emphasised

- Python (technical)
- FastAPI (technical)

### Additional

- Docker (technical)
- OpenAI APIs (technical)
- PyTest (technical)
- SQL (technical)
- LangChain (technical)
- ChromaDB (technical)
- Pandas (technical)
- REST APIs (technical)
- Microsoft Fabric (technical)
- Databricks (technical)
- Snowflake (technical)
- dbt (technical)
- Azure Data Factory (technical)
- Selenium WebDriver (technical)
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (domain)
- Operational intelligence (domain)
- Explainable AI (domain)
- Enterprise decision support (domain)
- Data engineering (domain)
- LLM application development (domain)
- Software quality assurance (domain)
- Architecture-first design (soft)

## Projects

### Operational Intelligence Copilot

Platform combining deterministic analytics with Large Language Model reasoning to generate explainable, evidence-backed executive insights.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, OpenAI APIs, PyTest, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Produces evidence-backed executive reporting.
- Maintains decision traceability.

**Demonstrates:**

- Intelligent intent routing
- Dataset profiling
- Anomaly detection
- Explainable AI recommendations

### Governance-Aware Document Intelligence RAG

Enterprise retrieval-augmented generation platform supporting trustworthy AI responses over organisational knowledge.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, Docker, LangChain, ChromaDB, OpenAI, PyTest, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Supports grounded responses over multi-format organisational documents.

**Demonstrates:**

- Multi-format document ingestion
- Retrieval orchestration
- Evaluation frameworks
- Grounding validation

### Payroll Diagnostics Engine

Rule-based decision-support platform that identifies payroll anomalies through deterministic business-rule evaluation.

**Technologies:** Python, Pandas, OpenPyXL, PyTest, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Produces explainable operational findings.

**Demonstrates:**

- Rule engines
- Explainable diagnostics
- Automated validation

## Experience

### AI Engineer - Independent Research & Development — Chase Risk & Compliance

*2025-12 – Present* · `independent_engineering`

Melbourne, VIC

- Independently develops progressively more complex production-minded AI Engineering projects under a dedicated portfolio brand.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, Docker, OpenAI APIs, PyTest

### AI Engineering Professional Development and Portfolio Development — Independent study

*2025-07 – 2025-11* · `professional_development`

Melbourne, VIC

- Pivoted from Data Engineering to AI Engineering as the primary focus.
- Undertook structured AI Engineering study.
- Developed progressively more sophisticated portfolio projects.

**Technologies:** Python, OpenAI APIs, LangChain, Git, PyTest

### Data Engineering Professional Development and Career Transition — Independent study

*2023-10 – 2025-06* · `professional_development`

Melbourne, VIC

- Began with a personal break following the nbn Australia role.
- Undertook structured upskilling in modern Data Engineering.

**Technologies:** Microsoft Fabric, Databricks, Snowflake, dbt, Azure Data Factory

### Data Engineer — nbn Australia

*2020-03 – 2023-10* · `employment`

- Developed enterprise data pipelines and operational reporting solutions.
- Performed SQL transformations and data validation.

**Technologies:** Python, SQL, Apache NiFi, Git, PyTest

## Certifications (profile baseline — not tailored)

- AWS Certified Developer - Associate (Amazon Web Services) — active
- Databricks Certified Data Engineer Professional (Databricks) — active

---

_Experience guidance: `master_cv_only`. This draft must not be submitted without owner review._
assumptions: Phase B copies the career-profile summary without rewriting; theme-guided summary rewriting is deferred to Phase C.
Certifications are rendered as a fixed profile baseline (active credentials only, profile order). They are not TailoringPlan-tailored content.
